name: Air Products & Chemicals, Inc.
summary: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. is a Delaware corporation founded in 1940 and a world-leading industrial gases company. It produces and sells atmospheric gases (oxygen, nitrogen, argon), process gases (hydrogen, helium, CO2, carbon monoxide, syngas), and specialty gases. The company also develops, engineers, builds, owns, and operates large clean hydrogen projects, and provides equipment including turbomachinery, membrane systems, and cryogenic containers to customers in refining, chemicals, metals, electronics, manufacturing, medical, and food industries.

products.name: Oxygen
products.description: Atmospheric gas produced primarily via cryogenic distillation of air, sold on-site or as merchant gas.

products.name: Nitrogen
products.description: Atmospheric gas recovered by cryogenic distillation of air, distributed on-site or as merchant gas.

products.name: Argon
products.description: Atmospheric gas recovered by cryogenic distillation of air for industrial applications.

products.name: Hydrogen
products.description: Process gas produced from byproduct sources (gray), hydrocarbons with carbon capture (blue), or renewable energy (green).

products.name: Helium
products.description: Process gas sourced globally, stored in ISO containers and underground facilities in Texas.

products.name: Carbon Dioxide (CO2)
products.description: Process gas purified and sold for industrial use.

products.name: Carbon Monoxide
products.description: Process gas produced via steam methane reforming or gasification.

products.name: Syngas
products.description: Mixture of hydrogen and carbon monoxide produced via steam methane reformers or gasifiers.

products.name: Specialty Gases
products.description: Specialty gases sold primarily in packaged form to various industrial customers.

products.name: Turbomachinery
products.description: Specialized equipment sold to customers worldwide through sale of equipment segment.

products.name: Membrane Systems
products.description: Specialized membrane separation equipment sold to customers worldwide.

products.name: Cryogenic Containers
products.description: Specialized cryogenic storage and transport containers sold to customers worldwide.

partnerships.description: Joint involvement in the NEOM Green Hydrogen Project in Saudi Arabia producing carbon-free green hydrogen.
